From a girl’s point of view, boys are 22 good at hiding their feelings 22 it’s not easy to tell whether they are worried, sad or happy. To fully understand the opposite sex, you have to 23 the genetic difference. The emotional centers in women’s brains are larger and more active than those in men’s. When 24 difficulties, it is not necessary for men to talk about their problems with their friends. Men want to fix problems, 25 women tend to focus more on their emotions. Women want to discover 26 they feel about the problems. With so many differences, no wonder there is so much misunderstanding between the two sexes.

We should be careful about how often we use Facebook and what we post on it. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 The summer Olympic Games, first held in 1896, is an international multi-sport event that is hosted by a different city every four years. The most recent Olympics were held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil in 2016. The International Olympic Committee organizes the games and oversees the host city’s preparations. Athletes at the games participate to win medals for their countries. They participate in hundreds of events, one of which is swimming. For short swimming races, swimmers only swim two lengths of the pool. Swimmers can choose which kind of stroke they use in the contest. In diving event, divers jump from high above the water. They twist, flip and turn while in the air and get points for how well they dive. Swimming is one of the most popular contests. When it comes to swimming sports, people never fail to think of Michael Phelps. Swimmer Michael Phelps, who was born on June 30, 1985, has set the record for winning the most medals, 28, more than those won by other Olympic athletes in history.
